title: Terms & Conditions
subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before subscribing to any Pixflow Studio plan.

intro.title: Review before subscribing
intro.body: By subscribing to any Pixflow Studio plan, you agree to these Terms & Conditions. We recommend reviewing them fully before starting your subscription. If you have any questions, reach out at contact@pixflowstudio.com — we're happy to clarify anything.

sections.title: General Information
sections.body: Pixflow Studio provides subscription-based website design, development, hosting, maintenance, and related consulting services for small businesses. These Terms & Conditions govern the relationship between Pixflow Studio and any client who subscribes to our services.

sections.title: Services
sections.intro: Depending on your chosen plan, services may include:
items: Website design and development
Hosting and infrastructure management
Ongoing maintenance and updates
Content edits and copy updates
Technical support
Online presence consulting
sections.note: Consulting is included within your monthly subscription and is not billed separately.

sections.title: Subscription & Payments
items: Services are provided on a recurring monthly subscription basis.
Payments are processed securely through Stripe or another approved payment provider.
Clients may receive their subscription or payment link manually by email.
By subscribing to any plan, the client agrees to these Terms & Conditions.
Subscriptions renew automatically at the end of each billing cycle unless cancelled.

sections.title: Cancellation
items: Clients may cancel at any time — no questions asked.
Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing cycle.
No long-term contract is required unless otherwise agreed in writing.
After cancellation, access to hosted services will end at the close of the paid period.

subsections.heading: Pixflow Studio will:
items: Deliver services professionally and in good faith.
Maintain the agreed website and hosting for the duration of the subscription.
Communicate clearly and respond to requests within a reasonable timeframe.

subsections.heading: The client is responsible for:
items: All content, logos, text, images, branding assets, and other materials they provide.
Ensuring they have the legal right to use any submitted materials.
Keeping their contact and billing information up to date.

sections.title: Refund Policy
sections.body: Subscription payments are non-refundable once a billing period has started, unless required by applicable law. If you believe there has been an error with your billing, please contact us and we will review the situation fairly.

sections.title: Changes to These Terms
sections.body: Pixflow Studio may update these Terms & Conditions at any time. When we do, the updated version will be published on this page with a revised date. Continued use of our services after changes are published constitutes acceptance of the updated terms. We recommend checking this page periodically.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: If you have any questions about these Terms & Conditions or your subscription, please get in touch.
